defect: Certificate construction previously trusted frozen JSON audit rows without proving that each row resolved to real immutable human gold and the actual pipeline-selected machine winner.
repairs: Require explicit human_approved_gold_only audit authority, auditor identity, timezone-aware audit timestamp, and SHA-256 identities for the gold manifest, freeze marker, gold mask, machine lifecycle, and audited machine mask.
Resolve every selected audit row beneath the governed package root and reject path escape.
Rerun QC-001 through QC-010 on every referenced package and require approved_gold workflow, passing QA, a human reviewer, approval timestamp, and human_approved_gold label status.
Verify current manifest, freeze marker, label mask, manifest part entry, and exhaustive file-map hashes.

Resolve the machine lifecycle and winner mask below a separate governed root; require a valid lifecycle contract whose image, label, context, pipeline fingerprint, status, winner, ranking hash, and mask bytes match the audit row.
Emit schema 1.1.0 certificates carrying human_approved_gold_only authority and reject legacy certificates even when their internal certificate hash is valid.
Expose --gold-packages-root and --machine-artifacts-root on the certificate CLI.

black.command: uvx --from black==26.5.1 black --check src tests tools

production_verifier_tests: A real approve_package output with a frozen, hard-QA-passing left_forearm mask is accepted.
A real machine_verified_candidate lifecycle and its selected mask are accepted, then mask tampering is rejected.
Synthetic audit rows without package artifacts fail closed.
A hash-valid legacy schema 1.0.0 certificate cannot authorize autonomy.

authority.reason: The implementation gate is hardened, but no label/context has the required hundreds of independent human-truthed audits.
